projectDescription: HCEGuard is a Windows desktop application that provides secure, OTP-based player authentication and identity management for Halo CE game servers.
keyFeatures: OTP-based secure login with rolling verification codes
Halo CE integration for server-side player validation
Automatic session management with token refresh
Captcha protection after repeated failed login attempts
Local file integrity monitoring and auto-restore
publicApiSurface: POST /api/login — Authenticate with nick and OTP code
POST /refresh — Refresh access token using device ID
GET /api/servers — Fetch the list of authorized server IPs
GET /api/integration/allowed-files — Whitelist of allowed DLL files
GET /api/integration/allowed-configs — Whitelist of allowed Lua configs
GET /api/session/local-validation — Retrieve hash for local integration
POST /api/server-portal/access-link — Generate authenticated servers portal URL
